mapper.insert: insert into knowledge ( id, code, name, description, status, enabled, create_time, update_time, chunking_strategy, primary_content_field_key, chunk_size, max_chunk_size, chunk_overlap, rows_per_chunk, row_overlap, time_decay_enabled, time_decay_field_source, time_decay_field_key, time_decay_type, time_decay_scale, time_decay_offset, time_decay_decay, time_decay_floor, time_decay_apply_threshold, time_decay_lambda, time_decay_sigma ) values ( #{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{enabled}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{chunkingPolicy.strategy}, #{primaryContentFieldKey}, #{chunkingPolicy.chunkSize}, #{chunkingPolicy.maxChunkSize}, #{chunkingPolicy.overlap}, #{chunkingPolicy.rowsPerChunk}, #{chunkingPolicy.rowOverlap}, #{timeDecayConfig.enabled}, #{timeDecayConfig.fieldSource}, #{timeDecayConfig.fieldKey}, #{timeDecayConfig.decayType}, #{timeDecayConfig.scale}, #{timeDecayConfig.offset}, #{timeDecayConfig.decay}, #{timeDecayConfig.floor}, #{timeDecayConfig.applyThreshold}, #{timeDecayConfig.lambda}, #{timeDecayConfig.sigma} )
mapper.update: update knowledge set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = #{updateTime}, chunking_strategy = #{chunkingPolicy.strategy}, primary_content_field_key = #{primaryContentFieldKey}, chunk_size = #{chunkingPolicy.chunkSize}, max_chunk_size = #{chunkingPolicy.maxChunkSize}, chunk_overlap = #{chunkingPolicy.overlap}, rows_per_chunk = #{chunkingPolicy.rowsPerChunk}, row_overlap = #{chunkingPolicy.rowOverlap}, time_decay_enabled = #{timeDecayConfig.enabled}, time_decay_field_source = #{timeDecayConfig.fieldSource}, time_decay_field_key = #{timeDecayConfig.fieldKey}, time_decay_type = #{timeDecayConfig.decayType}, time_decay_scale = #{timeDecayConfig.scale}, time_decay_offset = #{timeDecayConfig.offset}, time_decay_decay = #{timeDecayConfig.decay}, time_decay_floor = #{timeDecayConfig.floor}, time_decay_apply_threshold = #{timeDecayConfig.applyThreshold}, time_decay_lambda = #{timeDecayConfig.lambda}, time_decay_sigma = #{timeDecayConfig.sigma} where id = #{id}
